channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Artemis crew reaches the moon, approaches record-breaking distance from Earth - Reuters
item.description:
1. Artemis crew reaches the moon, approaches record-breaking distance from Earth  Reuters
  2. Artemis II astronauts will see parts of the moon no human has before. Here’s how  CNN
  3. Live updates: Artemis II astronauts swing around the moon on record-breaking mission  NBC News
  4. Artemis II Flight Day 5: Correction Burn Complete  NASA (.gov)
  5. Artemis mission approaches lunar loop for first flyby since 1972  Yahoo

item.title: Artemis II toilet acts up again as astronauts speed toward the moon to break Apollo 13’s record - AL.com
item.description:

item.title: Scientists Uncover Three Oceans' Worth of Water Stored 700 Kilometers Below Earth's Surface - Indian Defence Review
item.description:
1. Scientists Uncover Three Oceans' Worth of Water Stored 700 Kilometers Below Earth's Surface  Indian Defence Review
  2. A discovery in the Earth's core casts doubt on the origin of much of the planet's water and forces us to rethink what we knew about the formation of the oceans  ECOticias.com
  3. A giant reservoir of water, three times larger than all oceans combined, has been discovered deep beneath the Earth's surface  Українські Національні Новини (УНН)
  4. Scientists discover a hidden ocean 700 kilometres beneath Earth that may be bigger than all oceans  MSN
  5. Scientists have found a massive water reservoir 700 kilometers below, holding more water than Earth’s entire surface  MSN
